name: econovaria-player-terminal-standalone

scripts.verify: npm run check && npm run smoke && npm run hardening && npm run correctness && npm run adapter && npm run store-flow && npm run audit && npm run audit:v75

description: Standalone Econovaria player frontend preserving the approved v7 design while hardening route loading, capabilities, transports, request validation, idempotency, authoritative refreshes, Student-Profile adapter contracts, and Store quote transactions.
